subject: [DOC] Fix docs requirements and Sphinx profiles
commit_message:
[DOC] Fix docs requirements and Sphinx profiles

- force lfdocs-confr~=0.7.5 in docs/requirements-docs.txt
- add funcparserlib==1.0.0a0 in docs/requirements-docs.txt
- enforce compatible versions in other listed packages

Issue-ID: DOC-765

Signed-off-by: guillaume.lambert <guillaume.lambert@orange.com>
Change-Id: If3c9758cb9d691b222b04a22145f33cfb4f2a72b

channe on the top of the relation chain passed the gate

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

Correction OK
A future lfdocs-conf version should include the right funcparserlib package version

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

OOM documentation is using plantuml directive.
As a result, sphinxcontrib-plantuml package must also be installed
lfdocs-conf now include correct funcparserlib version, but library not yet updated in PyPi

Patch Set 3:

Oups...Sorry for the previous comment.
sphinxcontrib.plantuml is in the requirements-docs.txt
Anyway, we should wait for new lfdocs-conf version to avoid to include funcparserlib here

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> Oups...Sorry for the previous comment.
> sphinxcontrib.plantuml is in the requirements-docs.txt
> Anyway, we should wait for new lfdocs-conf version to avoid to include funcparserlib here

this is good news.
OOM gate is currently broken because of that.
The changes in this relation intend to reestablish a correct jenkins verified +1 voting on the gate to ease reviews.
Until lf-docsconf is fixed, I think it is preferrable to merge this change to fix oom gate and proposes a new change as soon as the new lf-docsconf package is out.
